title: osmundastrum claytonianum
intro: Osmundastrum claytonianum, also known as Clayton's royal fern, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Osmundaceae family, native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Osmundastrum claytonianum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the dried leaves and stems, which can be infused in teas or applied topically as a poultice.
